hipcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libplugin_json_dyn.so -o ../../lib/libplugin_json_dyn.so CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/json_dyn/hip_domain/hip_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/json_dyn/hsa_domain/hsa_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/json_dyn/omp_tgt_domain/omp_tgt_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/json_dyn/omp_tgt_rtl_domain/omp_tgt_rtl_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/activity_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_json_dyn.dir/plugin.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lneto/RATELProf/ratelprof/build/lib ../../lib/libratelprof_core.so
